intro.title: Awesome Big Data
intro.desc: A curated list of awesome big data frameworks, resources and other awesomeness. Inspired by [awesome-php](https://github.com/ziadoz/awesome-php), [awesome-python](https://github.com/vinta/awesome-python), [awesome-ruby](https://github.com/Sdogruyol/awesome-ruby), [hadoopecosystemtable](http://hadoopecosystemtable.github.io/) & [big-data](http://usefulstuff.io/big-data/).

detalle.name: awesome-bigdata
